module.name: common
module.purpose: Owns shared configuration, level-based telemetry logging with threshold queries, executable-sibling standalone tool logging, approved external wrappers including Tokio timers, generic Actor and Runtime contracts, signatures, authenticated channels, and insertion-ordered work queues.

childModules.name: actor
childModules.purpose: Defines generic Actor and Runtime contracts, a typed StatusOf alias, and a single-mutex Lifecycle whose ActorStatus<Result> carries completion results.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Loads typed executable-relative configuration and models All/Win/Ubuntu platforms, All/Amd/Arm 64-bit architecture families, concrete host detection, and wildcard tool-side compatibility; owns ModelConfig, which pairs a selected model name with always-present DeepseekConfig and GlmConfig endpoint/model/api_key sections.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Re-exports approved third-party namespaces and traits, including redb APIs and Tokio networking, runtime, synchronization, task, spawning, selection, and time APIs.

childModules.name: logging
childModules.purpose: Provides level-based telemetry, remote-first delivery, batched indexed redb persistence, minimum-level threshold and paged summary/full-record queries, and executable-sibling JSONL fallback.

childModules.name: logging_tool
childModules.purpose: Creates unique executable-sibling log files for standalone tools and writes and flushes one message per line.

childModules.name: structure
childModules.purpose: Provides authenticated channels, tuned with TCP keepalive, and insertion-ordered concurrent work queues.
